---
title: "Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Shepards Canyon Descent"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="27.96" data-elevation="3596.13" data-time="197" data-has-gravel="false">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>27.96</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3596.13 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~3:17</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.44 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#d9ef8b;">67%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>15.27</td>
      <td>55.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>4.12</td>
      <td>15.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>3.26</td>
      <td>12.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>2.59</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>2.28</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.44</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,877</td>
      <td>9.3</td>
      <td>96 ± 50</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Broadway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>106</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Broadway: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>81</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Broadway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>81</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Warren Freeway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>62</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Broadway: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>132</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Tunnel Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>258</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>10 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Tunnel Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>373</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>11 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Broadway Terrace: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>137</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9. Skyline Boulevard: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>134</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>10. Skyline Boulevard: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>38</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>11. Pinehurst Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>69</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>12. Pinehurst Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>377</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>13. Redwood Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>300</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>13 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>14. Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>123</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>15. Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>195</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>7 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>16. Skyline Boulevard: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>176</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>6 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>17. Skyline Boulevard: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>123</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>18. Mountain Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>67</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>19. Broadway Terrace: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>46</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,877</td>
      <td>27.9</td>
      <td>197 ± 79</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.7</td>
      <td>9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Broadway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>106</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Broadway: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>81</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Broadway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>81</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Warren Freeway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>62</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Broadway: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>132</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Tunnel Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>258</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>10 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Tunnel Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>373</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>11 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Broadway Terrace: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>137</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9. Skyline Boulevard: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>134</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>10. Skyline Boulevard: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>38</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>11. Pinehurst Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>69</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>3.7</td>
      <td>20</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>12. Pinehurst Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>377</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>13. Redwood Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>300</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>13 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>14. Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>123</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>15. Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>195</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>7 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>16. Skyline Boulevard: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>176</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>6 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>17. Skyline Boulevard: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>123</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>4.6</td>
      <td>25</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>18. Mountain Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>67</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>19. Broadway Terrace: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>46</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.7</td>
      <td>14</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>7.6</td>
      <td>27.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>6.9</td>
      <td>24.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>6.2</td>
      <td>22.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>4.5</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>3.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>3.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
